metadata.description: AWOS plugins for AI-native development workflows

plugins.name: awos
plugins.description: Extends AWOS core with AI-powered delivery automation: audits a project's AI-readiness across quality dimensions (/awos:ai-readiness-audit) and sets up an end-to-end delivery flow — feature and optional bug-fix commands — tailored to the team (/awos:flow).

plugins.name: awos-containment
plugins.description: Least-privilege containment hook that blocks out-of-tree writes, network egress, and secret reads during AWOS runs
